title: UI-052: /studio/catalogue-series/?mode=new is the series create entry point, the Catalogue dashboard now has...
subjects: route migration for parent-record unified create/edit
summary: after the series editor gained ?mode=new, active navigation still presented series creation as a separate route. Outcome: /studio/catalogue-series/?mode=new is the series create entry point, the Catalogue dashboard now has one Series Editor entry, and catalogue_new_series_editor is retired from active config.
body:
## UI Rule Log 2026-04-29 / UI-052

- status: adopted
- route: `/studio/catalogue/`, `/studio/catalogue-new-series/`, `/studio/catalogue-series/`
- issue: after the series editor gained `?mode=new`, active navigation still presented series creation as a separate route.
- triage: route migration for parent-record unified create/edit
- reasoning: keeping the old create page active would split testing and make the dashboard imply two series workflows. The unified editor should be the only active entry point.
- permanent rule: after a parent-record editor gains unified create mode, collapse dashboard links to one editor entry, remove the retired create route, and remove retired create-route keys and UI text from active Studio config.
- outcome: `/studio/catalogue-series/?mode=new` is the series create entry point, the Catalogue dashboard now has one `Series Editor` entry, and `catalogue_new_series_editor` is retired from active config.
- files changed:
  - `studio/catalogue/index.md`
  - `studio/catalogue-new-series/index.md`
  - `assets/studio/data/studio_config.json`
  - `assets/studio/js/studio-config.js`
  - `_docs/catalogue-new-series-editor.md`
  - `_docs/studio-runtime.md`
  - `_docs/user-guide.md`
  - `_docs/studio-e2e-checklist.md`
  - `_docs/site-request-catalogue-series-unified-editor.md`
  - `_docs/studio-ui-rules.md`
- local verification:
  - open `/studio/catalogue/` and confirm the dashboard exposes one series editor entry
  - open `/studio/catalogue-series/` and `/studio/catalogue-series/?mode=new` and confirm both render
effect: keeping the old create page active would split testing and make the dashboard imply two series workflows.
area: /studio/catalogue/, /studio/catalogue-new-series/, /studio/catalogue-series/ / route migration for parent-record unified create/edit
verification: open `/studio/catalogue/` and confirm the dashboard exposes one series editor entry
open `/studio/catalogue-series/` and `/studio/catalogue-series/?mode=new` and confirm both render
